    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    T

    tags - Variable in class model.Issue
    A set of textual tags associated with this issue for categorization or filtering.
    tearDown() - Method in class tests.IssueManagerTest
     
    tearDown() - Method in class tests.IssueTest
     
    tearDown() - Method in class tests.UserTest
     
    testAddCorrectTags() - Method in class tests.IssueTest
    Verifies that valid tags are correctly stored and can be retrieved from the Issue.
    testAddDueDateBeforeNow() - Method in class tests.IssueTest
    Verifies that setting a due date in the past throws an InvalidIssueDataException.
    testAddVariousTags(String) - Method in class tests.IssueTest
    Verifies that adding various tag values (including empty or blank strings) does not throw exceptions.
    testAssignNullUser() - Method in class tests.IssueTest
    Verifies that assigning a null user throws an InvalidIssueDataException.
    testAssignUser() - Method in class tests.IssueTest
    Verifies that a valid user can be assigned and is correctly stored in the Issue.
    testFilterByTitleEmpty(String) - Method in class tests.IssueManagerTest
    Verifies that filtering by an empty or blank title returns all stored issues.
    testFilterByTitleSpecific() - Method in class tests.IssueManagerTest
    Verifies that filtering by a specific title fragment returns only the issues whose titles contain that fragment.
    testFindIssueById() - Method in class tests.IssueManagerTest
    Verifies that an Issue can be found by its unique ID.
    testFindIssueByName() - Method in class tests.IssueManagerTest
    Verifies that an Issue can be found by its title.
    testRoles() - Method in class tests.UserTest
    Tests if the roles are assigned to the user
    tests - package tests
     
    testSetPriority(Priority) - Method in class tests.IssueTest
    Verifies that all Priority enum values can be set without throwing an exception.
    testSetStatus(BugStatus) - Method in class tests.IssueTest
    Verifies that all BugStatus enum values can be set without throwing an exception.
    testShortIssueNoDescCreation(String) - Method in class tests.IssueTest
    Verifies that creating an Issue with a null or empty description throws an InvalidIssueDataException.
    testShortIssueNoTitleCreation(String) - Method in class tests.IssueTest
    Verifies that creating an Issue with a null or empty title throws an InvalidIssueDataException.
    testShortIssueNoUserCreation() - Method in class tests.IssueTest
    Verifies that creating an Issue without a reporter (User) throws an InvalidIssueDataException.
    testShortIssueValidCreation() - Method in class tests.IssueTest
    Verifies that an Issue with valid title, description, and reporter is created successfully.
    testUpdateFromDifferentFields() - Method in class tests.IssueTest
    Verifies that updateFrom correctly updates all mutable fields of an Issue using another Issue instance.
    text - Variable in class model.Comment
    Comment contents
    title - Variable in class model.Issue
    Short descriptive title summarizing the issue.
    title - Variable in record class model.IssueFullRecord
    The field for the title record component.
    title - Variable in record class model.IssueListRecord
    The field for the title record component.
    title() - Method in record class model.IssueFullRecord
    Returns the value of the title record component.
    title() - Method in record class model.IssueListRecord
    Returns the value of the title record component.
    toArrayOfStrings() - Static method in enum class model.BugStatus
    Converts enum values to the string array for the purposes of ComboBox.
    toString() - Method in record class model.IssueFullRecord
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class model.IssueListRecord
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class model.UserFullRecord
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class model.UserListRecord
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
